when proposing code, please follow the official documentations first
- https://developers.openai.com/api/reference
- https://aiogram.dev
- https://developers.openai.com/api/reference
- https://core.telegram.org
- https://www.postgresql.org/docs/current/index.html
this project can hold different types of code, so please make sure to check the file type before proposing code
simplify code and avoid unnecessary complexity, if you think a code can be simplified, please do so
if you are not sure about the code, please ask for clarification before proposing code
if you are proposing code, please make sure to include comments explaining the code and its purpose
don't generate documentation unless its requested, focus on generating code that is clear and easy to understand
if you need to create docker files please use a dedicated folder for them, and make sure to include a README file explaining how to use the docker files
don't generate code unless it's asked
